summary: Backend-only regression completed for MongoDB persistence, sessions, mission logs, dashboard snapshot, and app version endpoint. Full suite passes.

minor.issue: Global 401 handler redirects to '/' (302) for API calls; JSON clients expecting 401 may need endpoint-specific handling.

action_items: Optional: decide whether API unauthorized responses should return JSON 401 instead of browser-style 302 redirects.
Optional: keep warning cleanup ticket for python_multipart pending deprecation in Starlette.
critical_code_review_comments: No functional regression found in MongoDB-backed variant/session persistence.
No explicit migration hook/path from prior in-memory runtime state was found; likely acceptable but not directly verifiable in restart scenarios.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Credential source verified at /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Added /app/tests/test_persistence_regression.py covering session reuse across client instances, mission log persistence across fresh state object, and dashboard snapshot live payload/version checks. Latest run: 37 passed.
rca of the issue: No blocker issue reproduced. Minor design/API behavior note: global 401 handler currently redirects all unauthorized requests, including API endpoints.
